info.title: Rigbox Auth Access Control API
info.description: Public access-control APIs served by rig-auth-service. Canonical refs use forms like `rig:account:u-123`, `rig:workspace:ws-123`, and `rig:app:app-123`. Use `/api/access-control/principals` to look up assignable users, `/api/access-control/bindings` for role grants, `/api/access-control/tags` for tag maps, `/api/access-control/throttle-binding` for throttle profiles, `/api/access-control/throttle-presets` to inspect available throttle profiles, and `/api/access-control/simulate` to preview an action against a canonical resource ref.

400.description: Invalid resource or unsupported direct bindings

403.description: Caller is not allowed to read bindings for this resource

400.description: Invalid request or unknown role preset

403.description: Caller is not allowed to modify bindings for this resource
Caller is not allowed to modify bindings for this resource

400.description: Invalid request or unknown role preset

403.description: Caller is not allowed to modify bindings for this resource
Caller is not allowed to manage bindings for this resource

parameters.name: scope_kind
parameters.description: Optional role preset scope: platform, account, or workspace

403.description: Caller is not allowed to simulate access for this resource

400.description: Invalid resource or unsupported direct tags

403.description: Caller is not allowed to read tags for this resource

400.description: Invalid resource or unsupported direct tags

403.description: Caller is not allowed to update tags for this resource

400.description: Invalid resource or unsupported direct throttle binding

403.description: Caller is not allowed to read throttle bindings for this resource

400.description: Invalid resource or unknown throttle preset

403.description: Caller is not allowed to update throttle bindings for this resource

200.description: Available throttle presets for a resource

400.description: Invalid resource or unsupported direct throttle binding

403.description: Caller is not allowed to manage throttle bindings for this resource
